steps.title: Locate 55 mph on the horizontal axis
steps.content:
Find 55 on the x‑axis (speed). It lies halfway between the 50 and 60 marks, as shown by the grid lines.
This tells us to look at the point on the curve directly above $x=55$.

At $x=55$, the quadratic curve passes through a point whose y‑value (stopping distance) is about 210 ft, halfway between the 200‑ft and 220‑ft horizontal grid lines.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
steps.title: Read the stopping distance from the curve
